full_text:
Ju Zong 沮宗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Ju Zong (沮宗). Didn’t understand why his brother was afraid, saying Cao Cao’s army was inferior. Ju Zong was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
